title: "LOCK HER UP" — THEN "THEY'RE GOOD PEOPLE" 2 WEEKS LATER
title_alt: 60 MINUTES NOV 13, 2016 — THE PROMISE WAS BURIED
THE LOUDEST CHANT OF 2016. EMPTY DOJ DOCKET.
description:
The loudest chant of the 2016 rally circuit was buried two weeks after election day.

November 13, 2016 — 60 Minutes interview. Direct quote on Clinton: "I don't want to hurt them, they're good people." Then four years of DOJ press releases followed: no special prosecutor was ever appointed, no charges were filed, no investigation was opened.

The book grades it BROKEN. The receipt is the empty docket.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=lock-her-up

#politics #trump #shorts #factcheck
